title: Speaking - Part 3
description: Discuss the options shown with your partner for about two minutes, then decide together which two would be most effective.

content.task: Discuss the following values that sport can teach, then decide which two are most important for young people's development.
options: Respect for rules and fair play

script.text: Now, I'd like you to talk about something together for about two minutes. Here are some ideas related to sport, competition and values. Discuss the following values that sport can teach, then decide which two are most important for young people's development. You have about two minutes for this, so don't worry if I stop you. Please speak so that we can hear you.
Now decide which two are most important for young people's development..
